He takes the town's safety personally and has little patience for fools, but respects those who pull their weight.", "location": "Watch Barracks", "skills": {"athletics": 3, "perception": 2, "intimidation": 2, "insight": 1}, "stats": {"strength": 13, "dexterity": 12, "constitution": 12, "intelligence": 10, "wisdom": 11, "charisma": 10}, "tags": ["watch", "authority"], "memory": ["Varr has increased patrol rotations because reports cluster around the same hours before dawn.", "He is suspicious of the wizard, but equally concerned that fear is pushing townsfolk toward vigilantism."]}, {"key": "Caretaker Ilya", "name": "Caretaker Ilya", "entity_type": "npc", "description": "Ilya quietly cleans the old shrine and replaces wilted offerings. She claims to have seen strange lights near the well on stormy nights.", "location": "Old Shrine", "skills": {"insight": 3, "medicine": 3, "religion": 2, "perception": 2}, "stats": {"strength": 9, "dexterity": 10, "constitution": 11, "intelligence": 12, "wisdom": 15, "charisma": 12}, "tags": ["shrine", "caretaker", "omens"], "memory": ["Ilya has found fresh offerings at the old shrine placed by hands that later denied visiting.", "She believes the town is caught in a cycle that repeats each night with pieces missing each morning."]}, {"key": "Cleric Serah", "name": "Cleric Serah", "entity_type": "npc", "description": "Serah, a middle-aged cleric of the sea goddess, tends to sailors and townsfolk alike. She listens more than she speaks and keeps a careful eye on omens from the harbor\u2014and on the strange emptiness in the eyes of those who wake up with blood on their doorsteps.", "location": "Temple of the Tide", "skills": {"insight": 3, "medicine": 3, "religion": 2, "perception": 2}, "stats": {"strength": 9, "dexterity": 10, "constitution": 11, "intelligence": 12, "wisdom": 15, "charisma": 12}, "tags": ["temple", "healer", "trusted"], "memory": ["Serah has treated people with stress wounds and torn clothing they cannot explain.", "She keeps private notes on recurring symbols linked to the bloodstains and memory lapses."]}, {"key": "Cook Brenna", "name": "Cook Brenna", "entity_type": "npc", "description": "Brenna is the Copper Cup's harried cook, always juggling pots and shouting orders through the kitchen door. She hears everything that happens near the back rooms.", "location": "Back Door - Copper Cup", "skills": {"athletics": 3, "survival": 2, "perception": 1}, "stats": {"strength": 14, "dexterity": 11, "constitution": 13, "intelligence": 9, "wisdom": 10, "charisma": 9}, "tags": ["tavern", "staff"], "memory": ["Brenna hears every argument near the back door and noticed Mitch pacing there before dawn twice this week.", "She remembers seeing dark smears on a crate that were gone after sunrise."]}, {"key": "Deckhand Finn", "name": "Deckhand Finn", "entity_type": "npc", "description": "Finn is a young deckhand with rope-burned hands and boundless curiosity. He listens in on sailor gossip and can point out trouble brewing on the piers.", "location": "Docks", "skills": {"athletics": 2, "survival": 2, "perception": 2, "insight": 1}, "stats": {"strength": 12, "dexterity": 12, "constitution": 12, "intelligence": 10, "wisdom": 11, "charisma": 10}, "tags": ["dockworker", "gossip"], "memory": ["Finn saw someone rinsing a rope at the dock pump well past curfew.", "He spreads rumors quickly but gets details right more often than people expect."]}, {"key": "Dockmaster Hara", "name": "Dockmaster Hara", "entity_type": "npc", "description": "Hara keeps a ledger tucked under one arm as she strides up and down the docks. She knows which ships arrived late, which cargo went missing, and which captains owe favors. She is quietly furious about the unexplained stains turning up near her warehouses.", "location": "Docks", "skills": {"persuasion": 3, "insight": 2, "investigation": 2, "deception": 1}, "stats": {"strength": 10, "dexterity": 11, "constitution": 10, "intelligence": 12, "wisdom": 12, "charisma": 13}, "tags": ["harbor", "authority"], "memory": ["Hara tracks cargo and says missing-hour gaps line up with unexplained ledger discrepancies.", "She quietly suspects a cover-up larger than simple dockside crime."]}, {"key": "Edda", "name": "Edda", "entity_type": "npc", "description": "A scholar cataloging tavern legends, forever scribbling into a leather folio.", "location": "Copper Cup", "skills": {"history": 4, "investigation": 3, "insight": 2, "arcana": 2}, "stats": {"strength": 9, "dexterity": 11, "constitution": 10, "intelligence": 15, "wisdom": 13, "charisma": 11}, "tags": ["scholar", "observer"], "memory": ["Edda is cataloging oral histories and noticed old legends describing memory theft tied to blood oaths.", "She thinks the present crisis mirrors a partial account from decades ago."]}, {"key": "Fence Caris", "name": "Fence Caris", "entity_type": "npc", "description": "Caris leans in the shadows near a back door, dealing in small stolen goods and no questions asked. She prefers to stay out of sight when guards are near.", "location": "East Alley", "skills": {"stealth": 4, "sleight_of_hand": 3, "investigation": 2, "deception": 2, "perception": 2}, "stats": {"strength": 10, "dexterity": 14, "constitution": 11, "intelligence": 12, "wisdom": 11, "charisma": 13}, "tags": ["underworld", "fence"], "memory": ["Caris sold lock tools to someone matching Mitch's build, but keeps that detail close.", "She avoids the Smugglers Entrance on nights when the moon is hidden."]}, {"key": "Fisher Mira", "name": "Fisher Mira", "entity_type": "npc", "description": "Mira cleans fish with quick, practiced motions, humming an old sea-song under her breath. She keeps an eye on the river for signs of storms or trouble, and she is one of the few who admits she sometimes wakes up with her boots wet and no memory of why.", "location": "Fishermen's Shacks", "skills": {"athletics": 2, "survival": 2, "perception": 2, "insight": 1}, "stats": {"strength": 12, "dexterity": 12, "constitution": 12, "intelligence": 10, "wisdom": 11, "charisma": 10}, "tags": ["riverfolk", "witness"], "memory": ["Mira has awakened with wet boots and river silt in her doorway despite no memory of leaving bed.", "She trusts cleric Serah more than the watch to handle delicate truths."]}, {"key": "Fisher Rian", "name": "Fisher Rian", "entity_type": "npc", "description": "Rian mends nets on an upturned crate outside his shack, grumbling about changing tides and strange catches pulled from deeper waters.", "location": "Fishermen's Shacks", "skills": {"athletics": 3, "survival": 2, "perception": 1}, "stats": {"strength": 14, "dexterity": 11, "constitution": 13, "intelligence": 9, "wisdom": 10, "charisma": 9}, "tags": ["riverfolk"], "memory": ["Rian has pulled torn cloth and dark residue from his nets at dawn several times.", "He believes someone is moving bodies or evidence by water before sunrise."]}, {"key": "Fishmonger Talo", "name": "Fishmonger Talo", "entity_type": "npc", "description": "Talo's stall overflows with the day's catch laid over crushed ice. He knows every captain on the docks and the gossip that rides in with their ships.", "location": "Market Stalls", "skills": {"persuasion": 3, "insight": 2, "investigation": 2, "deception": 1}, "stats": {"strength": 10, "dexterity": 11, "constitution": 10, "intelligence": 12, "wisdom": 12, "charisma": 13}, "tags": ["market", "merchant"], "memory": ["Talo hears gossip from every crew and says fear has cut evening market traffic in half.", "He remembers seeing Mitch buy extra lamp oil on a night now missing from many memories."]}, {"key": "Foreman Kesh", "name": "Foreman Kesh", "entity_type": "npc", "description": "Kesh oversees the loading crews with a barked order and a sharp eye. He insists everything is above board, but his ledgers don't always match what moves in the night.", "location": "Warehouse Row", "skills": {"athletics": 3, "survival": 2, "perception": 1}, "stats": {"strength": 14, "dexterity": 11, "constitution": 13, "intelligence": 9, "wisdom": 10, "charisma": 9}, "tags": ["warehouse", "foreman"], "memory": ["Kesh has corrected warehouse counts after nights when workers insist they never unloaded cargo.", "He knows Lia uses the tunnels but denies official knowledge."]}, {"key": "Gate Guard Ren", "name": "Gate Guard Ren", "entity_type": "npc", "description": "Ren leans on his spear at the harbor gate, sizing up everyone who passes. He's seen enough trouble to be wary, but a kind word or shared drink can loosen his tongue.", "location": "Harbor Gate", "skills": {"athletics": 3, "perception": 2, "intimidation": 2, "insight": 1}, "stats": {"strength": 13, "dexterity": 12, "constitution": 12, "intelligence": 10, "wisdom": 11, "charisma": 10}, "tags": ["watch", "checkpoint"], "memory": ["Ren has turned away travelers after midnight because too many arrived confused and bloodstained.", "He keeps a mental list of townsfolk who wander at night and deny it by morning."]}, {"key": "Lysa", "name": "Lysa", "entity_type": "npc", "description": "A traveling bard tuning a battered lute, eager for new tales.", "location": "Copper Cup", "skills": {"performance": 4, "deception": 2, "perception": 2, "persuasion": 2}, "stats": {"strength": 9, "dexterity": 13, "constitution": 10, "intelligence": 11, "wisdom": 10, "charisma": 14}, "tags": ["bard", "traveler"], "memory": ["Lysa collects songs and rumors and has turned local fear into veiled tavern ballads.", "She noticed patrons forgetting songs she just performed the previous evening."]}, {"key": "Mara", "name": "Mara", "entity_type": "npc", "description": "The proprietor. Married to Brin. Her wedding anniversary is April 15th. Brisk, perceptive, and inclined to help if treated respectfully.", "location": "Bar Counter", "skills": {"persuasion": 3, "insight": 2, "investigation": 2, "deception": 1}, "stats": {"strength": 10, "dexterity": 11, "constitution": 10, "intelligence": 12, "wisdom": 12, "charisma": 13}, "tags": ["tavern", "proprietor", "informant"], "memory": ["Mara keeps the storeroom code private and knows someone has tested the lock repeatedly.", "She trusts the player more than most outsiders once they show respect for her staff."]}, {"key": "Mayor Elric", "name": "Mayor Elric", "entity_type": "npc", "description": "Mayor Elric is a tired man in a well-kept coat, juggling merchants' demands and the growing panic over unexplained bloodstains. No one has truly gone missing, but he fears the town is fraying and doesn't know how much longer he can pretend things are under control.", "location": "Town Hall", "skills": {"persuasion": 3, "insight": 2, "investigation": 2, "deception": 1}, "stats": {"strength": 10, "dexterity": 11, "constitution": 10, "intelligence": 12, "wisdom": 12, "charisma": 13}, "tags": ["civic", "authority"], "memory": ["Elric is balancing public calm against private panic and has delayed announcing full incident numbers.", "He asked Scribe Loth to archive certain reports until facts can be verified."]}, {"key": "Mitch", "name": "Mitch", "entity_type": "npc", "description": "A broad-shouldered lumberjack with haunted eyes and a strained need for someone to believe him.", "location": "Town Square", "skills": {"athletics": 3, "survival": 2, "perception": 1}, "stats": {"strength": 14, "dexterity": 11, "constitution": 13, "intelligence": 9, "wisdom": 10, "charisma": 9}, "tags": ["witness", "unstable", "woodcutter", "prime_suspect"], "memory": ["Mitch says he found one of the first bloodstains near the riverside before dawn.", "Mitch keeps blaming the wizard, but his story shifts when asked for details.", "He wakes exhausted with injuries that suggest violent work he cannot consciously recall.", "Mitch says he found one of the first bloodstains near the Riverside Path before dawn.", "Mitch keeps blaming the town wizard, but his story changes when pressed for exact times.", "Mitch looks exhausted and jittery, like he has not slept properly in several nights.", "Mitch's hands are heavily calloused from woodcutting, and he smells like sap, smoke, and wet earth."]}, {"key": "Novice Arel", "name": "Novice Arel", "entity_type": "npc", "description": "Arel is a young acolyte sweeping stone floors and lighting candles. Nervous but earnest, they have seen more than Serah realizes and struggle with what to share.", "location": "Temple of the Tide", "skills": {"insight": 3, "medicine": 3, "religion": 2, "perception": 2}, "stats": {"strength": 9, "dexterity": 10, "constitution": 11, "intelligence": 12, "wisdom": 15, "charisma": 12}, "tags": ["temple", "acolyte"], "memory": ["Arel has seen late-night visitors begging Serah for memory blessings.", "They found prayer beads near the well after a night of heavy rain and panic bells."]}, {"key": "Old Tellan", "name": "Old Tellan", "entity_type": "npc", "description": "Tellan sits on the well's rim spinning stories for anyone who will listen. Some tales are harmless gossip, others hint at things buried under the town and better left alone. Lately his stories keep circling back to nights no one quite remembers.", "location": "Old Well", "skills": {"history": 4, "investigation": 3, "insight": 2, "arcana": 2}, "stats": {"strength": 9, "dexterity": 11, "constitution": 10, "intelligence": 15, "wisdom": 13, "charisma": 11}, "tags": ["storyteller", "wellside"], "memory": ["Tellan claims the old well remembers what people choose to forget.", "His stories repeat specific names and dates that later appear in official reports."]}, {"key": "Scribe Loth", "name": "Scribe Loth", "entity_type": "npc", "description": "Loth is a meticulous scribe surrounded by inkpots and scrolls. He files complaints, tallies taxes, and occasionally buries inconvenient paperwork for the right favor.", "location": "Town Hall", "skills": {"history": 4, "investigation": 3, "insight": 2, "arcana": 2}, "stats": {"strength": 9, "dexterity": 11, "constitution": 10, "intelligence": 15, "wisdom": 13, "charisma": 11}, "tags": ["civic", "records"], "memory": ["Loth has filed multiple identical complaints from the same households across different dates.", "He maintains a hidden duplicate ledger because public records keep getting quietly amended."]}, {"key": "Smuggler Lia", "name": "Smuggler Lia", "entity_type": "npc", "description": "Lia moves quietly through the shadows beneath the warehouses. She trades in information as much as contraband and always seems to know who's asking too many questions.", "location": "Smuggler's Entrance", "skills": {"stealth": 4, "sleight_of_hand": 3, "investigation": 2, "deception": 2, "perception": 2}, "stats": {"strength": 10, "dexterity": 14, "constitution": 11, "intelligence": 12, "wisdom": 11, "charisma": 13}, "tags": ["underworld", "smuggler"], "memory": ["Lia uses the tunnel routes and has seen signs of hurried cleanup near Warehouse Row before sunrise.", "She will trade sensitive information for leverage, not loyalty."]}, {"key": "Spice Seller Nima", "name": "Spice Seller Nima", "entity_type": "npc", "description": "Nima sells jars of pungent spices and dried peppers from distant ports. Her keen nose and sharper memory make her a quiet observer of who buys what and why.", "location": "Market Stalls", "skills": {"persuasion": 3, "insight": 2, "investigation": 2, "deception": 1}, "stats": {"strength": 10, "dexterity": 11, "constitution": 10, "intelligence": 12, "wisdom": 12, "charisma": 13}, "tags": ["market", "merchant", "keen_observer"], "memory": ["Nima tracks unusual purchases and noticed a spike in lye, lamp oil, and bandages.", "She remembers voices arguing near Old Well just before dawn on market day."]}, {"key": "Street Performer Jorin", "name": "Street Performer Jorin", "entity_type": "npc", "description": "Jorin juggles knives and colored stones for gathered onlookers. Quick with a joke and quicker with his hands, he hears rumors before most anyone else.", "location": "Town Square", "skills": {"performance": 4, "deception": 2, "perception": 2, "persuasion": 2}, "stats": {"strength": 9, "dexterity": 13, "constitution": 10, "intelligence": 11, "wisdom": 10, "charisma": 14}, "tags": ["performer", "rumor_network"], "memory": ["Jorin watches faces while performing and can spot who is lying about where they were at night.", "He heard Mitch muttering about red hands that do not stay clean."]}, {"key": "Street Urchin Pip", "name": "Street Urchin Pip", "entity_type": "npc", "description": "Pip is a sharp-eyed child who knows every shortcut and loose shutter in the alleyways. They trade trinkets and rumors in exchange for coin, food, or kindness.", "location": "East Alley", "skills": {"stealth": 4, "sleight_of_hand": 3, "perception": 2, "insight": 1}, "stats": {"strength": 8, "dexterity": 14, "constitution": 10, "intelligence": 11, "wisdom": 12, "charisma": 10}, "tags": ["streetwise", "informant"], "memory": ["Pip knows hidden routes between East Alley, the back door, and warehouse drains.", "They found a knife wrap with fresh rust near a loose brick and left it where only they can recover it."]}, {"key": "Thom", "name": "Thom", "entity_type": "npc", "description": "An off-duty guard who prefers order and dislikes surprises upstairs.", "location": "Copper Cup", "skills": {"athletics": 3, "perception": 2, "intimidation": 2, "insight": 1}, "stats": {"strength": 13, "dexterity": 12, "constitution": 12, "intelligence": 10, "wisdom": 11, "charisma": 10}, "tags": ["watch", "off_duty_guard"], "memory": ["Thom saw watch reports edited after meetings with the mayor and the wizard.", "He dislikes surprises and reacts poorly when civilians interfere with barracks protocol."]}, {"key": "Town Crier Jessa", "name": "Town Crier Jessa", "entity_type": "npc", "description": "Jessa rings a handbell and repeats the town's latest bad news to anyone who will listen.", "location": "Town Square", "skills": {"persuasion": 3, "insight": 2, "investigation": 2, "deception": 1}, "stats": {"strength": 10, "dexterity": 11, "constitution": 10, "intelligence": 12, "wisdom": 12, "charisma": 13}, "tags": ["public_voice", "civic"], "memory": ["Jessa has repeated emergency notices all day and can recite each official statement verbatim.", "She noticed the wording of town warnings changed three times within two days."]}, {"key": "Town Wizard Arlen", "name": "Town Wizard Arlen", "entity_type": "npc", "description": "Arlen is a reclusive wizard who seldom leaves his guarded home. Whispers say he can pluck souls back from the brink and smooth away memories like ink from parchment.", "location": "Wizard's House", "skills": {"arcana": 5, "investigation": 4, "insight": 3, "history": 3}, "stats": {"strength": 8, "dexterity": 12, "constitution": 11, "intelligence": 16, "wisdom": 14, "charisma": 12}, "tags": ["arcane", "reclusive", "high_stakes"], "memory": ["Arlen has used risky memory-working spells to reduce panic after each night of violence.", "He believes containing the cycle is safer than exposing every detail to a terrified public."]}]}

She listens more than she speaks and keeps a careful eye on omens from the harbor\u2014and on the strange emptiness in the eyes of those who wake up with blood on their doorsteps.", "location": "Temple of the Tide", "skills": {"insight": 3, "medicine": 3, "religion": 2, "perception": 2}, "stats": {"strength": 9, "dexterity": 10, "constitution": 11, "intelligence": 12, "wisdom": 15, "charisma": 12}, "tags": ["temple", "healer", "trusted"], "memory": ["Serah has treated people with stress wounds and torn clothing they cannot explain.", "She keeps private notes on recurring symbols linked to the bloodstains and memory lapses."]}, {"key": "Cook Brenna", "name": "Cook Brenna", "entity_type": "npc", "description": "Brenna is the Copper Cup's harried cook, always juggling pots and shouting orders through the kitchen door. She hears everything that happens near the back rooms.", "location": "Back Door - Copper Cup", "skills": {"athletics": 3, "survival": 2, "perception": 1}, "stats": {"strength": 14, "dexterity": 11, "constitution": 13, "intelligence": 9, "wisdom": 10, "charisma": 9}, "tags": ["tavern", "staff"], "memory": ["Brenna hears every argument near the back door and noticed Mitch pacing there before dawn twice this week.", "She remembers seeing dark smears on a crate that were gone after sunrise."]}, {"key": "Deckhand Finn", "name": "Deckhand Finn", "entity_type": "npc", "description": "Finn is a young deckhand with rope-burned hands and boundless curiosity. He listens in on sailor gossip and can point out trouble brewing on the piers.", "location": "Docks", "skills": {"athletics": 2, "survival": 2, "perception": 2, "insight": 1}, "stats": {"strength": 12, "dexterity": 12, "constitution": 12, "intelligence": 10, "wisdom": 11, "charisma": 10}, "tags": ["dockworker", "gossip"], "memory": ["Finn saw someone rinsing a rope at the dock pump well past curfew.", "He spreads rumors quickly but gets details right more often than people expect."]}, {"key": "Dockmaster Hara", "name": "Dockmaster Hara", "entity_type": "npc", "description": "Hara keeps a ledger tucked under one arm as she strides up and down the docks. She knows which ships arrived late, which cargo went missing, and which captains owe favors. She prefers to stay out of sight when guards are near.", "location": "East Alley", "skills": {"stealth": 4, "sleight_of_hand": 3, "investigation": 2, "deception": 2, "perception": 2}, "stats": {"strength": 10, "dexterity": 14, "constitution": 11, "intelligence": 12, "wisdom": 11, "charisma": 13}, "tags": ["underworld", "fence"], "memory": ["Caris sold lock tools to someone matching Mitch's build, but keeps that detail close.", "She avoids the Smugglers Entrance on nights when the moon is hidden."]}, {"key": "Fisher Mira", "name": "Fisher Mira", "entity_type": "npc", "description": "Mira cleans fish with quick, practiced motions, humming an old sea-song under her breath. She keeps an eye on the river for signs of storms or trouble, and she is one of the few who admits she sometimes wakes up with her boots wet and no memory of why.", "location": "Fishermen's Shacks", "skills": {"athletics": 2, "survival": 2, "perception": 2, "insight": 1}, "stats": {"strength": 12, "dexterity": 12, "constitution": 12, "intelligence": 10, "wisdom": 11, "charisma": 10}, "tags": ["riverfolk", "witness"], "memory": ["Mira has awakened with wet boots and river silt in her doorway despite no memory of leaving bed.", "She trusts cleric Serah more than the watch to handle delicate truths."]}, {"key": "Fisher Rian", "name": "Fisher Rian", "entity_type": "npc", "description": "Rian mends nets on an upturned crate outside his shack, grumbling about changing tides and strange catches pulled from deeper waters.", "location": "Fishermen's Shacks", "skills": {"athletics": 3, "survival": 2, "perception": 1}, "stats": {"strength": 14, "dexterity": 11, "constitution": 13, "intelligence": 9, "wisdom": 10, "charisma": 9}, "tags": ["riverfolk"], "memory": ["Rian has pulled torn cloth and dark residue from his nets at dawn several times.", "He believes someone is moving bodies or evidence by water before sunrise."]}, {"key": "Fishmonger Talo", "name": "Fishmonger Talo", "entity_type": "npc", "description": "Talo's stall overflows with the day's catch laid over crushed ice. He insists everything is above board, but his ledgers don't always match what moves in the night.", "location": "Warehouse Row", "skills": {"athletics": 3, "survival": 2, "perception": 1}, "stats": {"strength": 14, "dexterity": 11, "constitution": 13, "intelligence": 9, "wisdom": 10, "charisma": 9}, "tags": ["warehouse", "foreman"], "memory": ["Kesh has corrected warehouse counts after nights when workers insist they never unloaded cargo.", "He knows Lia uses the tunnels but denies official knowledge."]}, {"key": "Gate Guard Ren", "name": "Gate Guard Ren", "entity_type": "npc", "description": "Ren leans on his spear at the harbor gate, sizing up everyone who passes. He's seen enough trouble to be wary, but a kind word or shared drink can loosen his tongue.", "location": "Harbor Gate", "skills": {"athletics": 3, "perception": 2, "intimidation": 2, "insight": 1}, "stats": {"strength": 13, "dexterity": 12, "constitution": 12, "intelligence": 10, "wisdom": 11, "charisma": 10}, "tags": ["watch", "checkpoint"], "memory": ["Ren has turned away travelers after midnight because too many arrived confused and bloodstained.", "He keeps a mental list of townsfolk who wander at night and deny it by morning."]}, {"key": "Lysa", "name": "Lysa", "entity_type": "npc", "description": "A traveling bard tuning a battered lute, eager for new tales.", "location": "Copper Cup", "skills": {"performance": 4, "deception": 2, "perception": 2, "persuasion": 2}, "stats": {"strength": 9, "dexterity": 13, "constitution": 10, "intelligence": 11, "wisdom": 10, "charisma": 14}, "tags": ["bard", "traveler"], "memory": ["Lysa collects songs and rumors and has turned local fear into veiled tavern ballads.", "She noticed patrons forgetting songs she just performed the previous evening."]}, {"key": "Mara", "name": "Mara", "entity_type": "npc", "description": "The proprietor. Married to Brin. Her wedding anniversary is April 15th. Brisk, perceptive, and inclined to help if treated respectfully.", "location": "Bar Counter", "skills": {"persuasion": 3, "insight": 2, "investigation": 2, "deception": 1}, "stats": {"strength": 10, "dexterity": 11, "constitution": 10, "intelligence": 12, "wisdom": 12, "charisma": 13}, "tags": ["tavern", "proprietor", "informant"], "memory": ["Mara keeps the storeroom code private and knows someone has tested the lock repeatedly.", "She trusts the player more than most outsiders once they show respect for her staff."]}, {"key": "Mayor Elric", "name": "Mayor Elric", "entity_type": "npc", "description": "Mayor Elric is a tired man in a well-kept coat, juggling merchants' demands and the growing panic over unexplained bloodstains. He files complaints, tallies taxes, and occasionally buries inconvenient paperwork for the right favor.", "location": "Town Hall", "skills": {"history": 4, "investigation": 3, "insight": 2, "arcana": 2}, "stats": {"strength": 9, "dexterity": 11, "constitution": 10, "intelligence": 15, "wisdom": 13, "charisma": 11}, "tags": ["civic", "records"], "memory": ["Loth has filed multiple identical complaints from the same households across different dates.", "He maintains a hidden duplicate ledger because public records keep getting quietly amended."]}, {"key": "Smuggler Lia", "name": "Smuggler Lia", "entity_type": "npc", "description": "Lia moves quietly through the shadows beneath the warehouses. Quick with a joke and quicker with his hands, he hears rumors before most anyone else.", "location": "Town Square", "skills": {"performance": 4, "deception": 2, "perception": 2, "persuasion": 2}, "stats": {"strength": 9, "dexterity": 13, "constitution": 10, "intelligence": 11, "wisdom": 10, "charisma": 14}, "tags": ["performer", "rumor_network"], "memory": ["Jorin watches faces while performing and can spot who is lying about where they were at night.", "He heard Mitch muttering about red hands that do not stay clean."]}, {"key": "Street Urchin Pip", "name": "Street Urchin Pip", "entity_type": "npc", "description": "Pip is a sharp-eyed child who knows every shortcut and loose shutter in the alleyways. NAR-01Simple move to Copper Cup | Attempts: 2 | Time: 7.01s | Words: 1311.000
Attempts: 2 | Time: 7.01s | Words: 131
Player input: I want to go to the Copper Cup.
FieldExpectedActualResult
has_two_sectionspasspassPASS
thoughts_before_narrativepasspassPASS
thoughts_is_first_personpasspassPASS
second_personpasspassPASS
no_explicit_choicespasspassPASS
minimum_lengthpasspassPASS
no_player_agency_takenpasspassPASS
narrative_no_the_playerpasspassPASS
narrative_no_bare_ipasspassPASS
mentions_current_locationpasspassPASS
Generated Narrative
You step through the back door of the Copper Cup, and the warm glow of lanterns spills across the wooden floor. The tavern is bustling, tables packed with patrons whose chatter blends with the clink of mugs. A rich aroma of stewed beans and salted fish mingles with the smoky scent of the hearth. Mara, the barkeep, keeps a watchful eye from behind the counter, her hands busy polishing a mug. Around you, Brin, Edda, Lysa, and Thom occupy a corner table, their voices rising in a low hum. The walls are adorned with faded sea charts, and a battered sign above the bar reads “Copper Cup.” The back door, the bar counter, a stair landing leading up, and a passage back into the town square are all within easy reach.
Raw LLM Output (last attempt)
Thoughts: The player has already moved to the Copper Cup, so the DM should describe the tavern’s ambience and current occupants. No action is required beyond narration.

Narrative: You step through the back door of the Copper Cup, and the warm glow of lanterns spills across the wooden floor. The tavern is bustling, tables packed with patrons whose chatter blends with the clink of mugs. A rich aroma of stewed beans and salted fish mingles with the smoky scent of the hearth. Mara, the barkeep, keeps a watchful eye from behind the counter, her hands busy polishing a mug. Around you, Brin, Edda, Lysa, and Thom occupy a corner table, their voices rising in a low hum. The walls are adorned with faded sea charts, and a battered sign above the bar reads “Copper Cup.” The back door, the bar counter, a stair landing leading up, and a passage back into the town square are all within easy reach.
Show 1 earlier attempt(s)
Attempt 1 (failed validation)
Raw Output - Attempt 1
Thoughts: The player has requested to go to the Copper Cup. The mechanics confirm the move succeeded. We need to describe the arrival in the tavern, the environment, and the key NPCs. No further actions requested, so just describe.Narrative: You step into the Copper Cup, the low‑beam lights casting a warm glow over the wooden tables. Lanterns sway gently above, their flickering flames reflecting off the polished counter. The scent of hearty stew mingles with the briny tang of sea‑salt and the smoky aroma of woodfire. The barkeep, Mara, stands behind the counter, her eyes flicking over the crowd as she watches everything. Around you, Brin, Edda, Lysa, and Thom are already seated at various tables, their voices rising in a lively murmur. The bar counter runs along one wall, and a staircase leads up to a landing just beyond the bar. The back door is a short walk away, and a staircase leads back down to the town square. You’re now fully immersed in the bustling harbor tavern.

The gate stands tall on the eastern edge of the square, its iron bars gleaming in the lantern light. Guards stand watch nearby, eyes flicking between the bustling crowd and the gate. The cobblestones beneath your feet are slick with recent rain, and the murmur of traders and the clatter of a nearby cart fill the air. You remain in the town square, surrounded by the usual mix of merchants, guards, and the distant scent of saltwater from the harbor beyond.

The night air hangs heavy over the cobbled heart of the harbor, lanterns flickering in a steady rhythm that casts long, wavering shadows across the square. Merchants haggling with the clatter of coins, guards in their polished armor, and the low murmur of dockworkers fill the space with a familiar, bustling hum. You stand where the bronze fountain coin glints in the lantern light, but the sky above offers no path for you—no wings, no spell, no magical device to lift you off the ground. The Wizard’s House lies across the square, its stone walls and tall, narrow windows visible from here, but to reach it you will need to walk or find another way. You remain in the Town Square, surrounded by the sounds and scents of the evening market.

Generated Narrative
You step into the East Alley, the cobbles underfoot still dark from yesterday’s rain. A thin curtain of shadow hangs between the crumbling walls, broken only by the occasional flicker of a stray lantern. The air smells of damp stone and the faint scent of laundry drying on the ropes overhead. To your left, the doorframe of the Copper Cup’s back door shows fresh marks of cleaning, while a cracked window in the adjacent building lets in a sliver of street light. A lone street urchin, Pip, scampers past, his eyes darting around, and a fence named Caris leans against a pillar, his gaze fixed on the alley’s exit. Near the base of a stone column, half‑hidden in the shadows, a slender knife lies on the cobbles, its blade catching a stray glint of light. The alley feels quiet, but the presence of Pip and Caris suggests that the street is still alive with hidden activity.
Raw LLM Output (last attempt)
Thoughts: The player wants to see the alley. The scene description already provides a sense of the alley. I should mention the actors and item that are present. No mechanics to resolve. Provide concise description.

Narrative: You step into the East Alley, the cobbles underfoot still dark from yesterday’s rain. A thin curtain of shadow hangs between the crumbling walls, broken only by the occasional flicker of a stray lantern. The air smells of damp stone and the faint scent of laundry drying on the ropes overhead. To your left, the doorframe of the Copper Cup’s back door shows fresh marks of cleaning, while a cracked window in the adjacent building lets in a sliver of street light. A lone street urchin, Pip, scampers past, his eyes darting around, and a fence named Caris leans against a pillar, his gaze fixed on the alley’s exit. Near the base of a stone column, half‑hidden in the shadows, a slender knife lies on the cobbles, its blade catching a stray glint of light. The alley feels quiet, but the presence of Pip and Caris suggests that the street is still alive with hidden activity.
Show 1 earlier attempt(s)
Attempt 1 (failed validation)
Raw Output - Attempt 1
Thoughts: The player wants a simple descriptive look around the alley. No checks or actions needed. Just provide a vivid but concise description of the alley, its features, actors, and items.Narrative: You step into the East Alley and the world narrows to a tight, dim corridor. The cobbles beneath your feet are slick with grime and the faint scent of old rain and sweat. Laundry lines stretch across the alley, the cloths swaying softly in a draft that carries the distant murmur of the town square. A few shutters along the walls are ajar, creaking slightly as they shift with the breeze. The doorframes of the houses lining the alley show fresh, bright paint marks—recently cleaned—contrasting against the darker, worn stone.

At a short distance to your left, a rough‑skinned fence named Caris is leaning against a wall, his eyes flicking to you as you move. Near the back of the alley, a small street urchin named Pip scampers around, his clothes patched and his ears twitching at every sound. Between them, a small, unremarkable knife lies half‑hidden in a shallow crack in the cobbles, its steel glinting faintly in the alley’s sparse light.

Beyond the narrow passage, the alley opens into three other routes: the back door of the Copper Cup to the north, the Old Shrine to the west, and a wider path leading toward the Town Square to the south.

Generated Narrative
Mara leans in, lowering her voice so only you can hear over the clatter of mugs and chatter. "I don't know much, and I don't want to give away too much," she says, eyes flicking to the stair landing before her. "But I've seen that lock on the stairway up—it's only opened once, on a certain day. It’s tied to an anniversary of some sort. If you can remember the right date, the lock should give up the secret." She gives you a brief, wary look, as if she's weighing whether to share more.
Raw LLM Output (last attempt)
Thoughts: The player has asked for information. The resolved turn indicates Mara will give a guarded response, hinting that the upstairs lock uses an anniversary date. No other details are needed; just convey her words and demeanor.

Narrative: Mara leans in, lowering her voice so only you can hear over the clatter of mugs and chatter. "I don't know much, and I don't want to give away too much," she says, eyes flicking to the stair landing before her. "But I've seen that lock on the stairway up—it's only opened once, on a certain day. It’s tied to an anniversary of some sort. If you can remember the right date, the lock should give up the secret." She gives you a brief, wary look, as if she's weighing whether to share more.

The cloth looks roughly a foot long and a half wide, folded neatly as if someone had hurriedly tucked it away. The scent of iron lingers in the air, and the faint hum of the alley around you seems to pause for a moment, as if the walls themselves are holding their breath. Caris and Pip are still there, watching you from a distance, but they seem unaware of the discovery you’ve just made.

The gate remains closed, and the bustling sounds of the harbor continue around you.

No new actions or options are introduced beyond what is natural for a guard's suspicion.Narrative: Guard Ren’s stern gaze narrows as you attempt to persuade him. He tilts his head, the weight of his duty clear in his posture. “No,” he says flatly, his voice echoing slightly off the stone arches. “You’re not authorized to pass.” His eyes flick toward the bustling docks, then back to you, a flicker of suspicion crossing his features. The guard’s hand hovers near his sword, and a few other soldiers in the guard posts shift their attention toward you, their stance tightening. The gate remains closed, and Ren’s watchful presence makes it clear that any further attempt to convince him will be met with increased scrutiny.

You look around the square for any sign of the wizard, but he’s nowhere to be seen. The only place he might be is his house at the edge of the square, a sturdy stone building with a wrought‑iron gate and a pair of guards standing watch. From here, you can’t see him, and you can’t get past the guards without some sort of distraction or entry. The guards are alert, their eyes flicking between the crowds, and they would surely notice any sudden attack. So, as it stands, you’re still standing in the town square, with the wizard safely behind his house and the guards keeping him under close watch.

You look around the square for any sign of the wizard, but he’s nowhere to be seen. The only place he might be is his house at the edge of the square, a sturdy stone building with a wrought‑iron gate and a pair of guards standing watch. From here, you can’t see him, and you can’t get past the guards without some sort of distraction or entry. The guards are alert, their eyes flicking between the crowds, and they would surely notice any sudden attack. Your knife cuts clean through Mitch’s arm, a sharp thud echoing as the metal meets flesh. Blood spurt's out, staining the worn wood of the bar. The wounded man staggers backward, his eyes wide with pain and disbelief, clutching the wounded arm as if to keep it from falling. A few nearby patrons freeze for a moment, then one of them—perhaps a drunk or a nervous sailor—throws a mug across the room in a desperate attempt to break the tense silence. The barkeep, Mara, steps forward with a look of alarm, her hand poised on the counter as she whispers to the others, "Everyone, stay back!" The air is thick with shouted warnings, the clatter of mugs, and the sudden, chaotic rush of bodies as people scramble to escape the sudden violence. The tavern’s low beams flicker over the scene, casting trembling shadows across the faces of those who have just witnessed a brutal confrontation.

Generated Narrative
You step into the warm glow of the Copper Cup, the clatter of mugs and chatter filling the air. Mara, the barkeep, leans over the counter, wiping a mug with a rag. She eyes you with a mix of curiosity and caution. "You’re looking for the lock date, eh?" she says, her voice rough but not unkind. "I’ve heard the lock opens on the night of the full moon—specifically on the fourteenth. The old tales say the clock in the town square strikes thirteen times that evening, and the lock will yield then." She taps the counter with a finger, as if to emphasize the point. The tavern hums around you, but her words settle in your mind like a key.
Raw LLM Output (last attempt)
Thoughts: The player has just spoken with Mara. The resolved state says she gave a partial clue about the lock date. I should describe her words, the tavern ambience, and any immediate effect. No further actions are required.

"I’ve heard the lock opens on the night of the full moon—specifically on the fourteenth. The old tales say the clock in the town square strikes thirteen times that evening, and the lock will yield then." She taps the counter with a finger, as if to emphasize the point. You stride toward the Temple of the Tide, your mind already rehearsing the words you'll say to Cleric Serah about the bloodstains. But the path from the square stretches far beyond the nearest cobbles. You glance over the harbor, past the bustling docks and the distant stone spires, and realize that the temple district is still a full block away, separated by market stalls, a watchful guard post, and the winding alleyways that cut through the town. With no shortcut in sight, you find yourself still in the center of the square, lanterns flickering above, the murmur of the crowd growing louder as more people whisper about the stains and the lost hours. The urgency of your mission presses against the damp night air, but for now, the temple remains just beyond reach.

Narrative: You stride toward the Temple of the Tide, your mind already rehearsing the words you'll say to Cleric Serah about the bloodstains. But the path from the square stretches far beyond the nearest cobbles. You glance over the harbor, past the bustling docks and the distant stone spires, and realize that the temple district is still a full block away, separated by market stalls, a watchful guard post, and the winding alleyways that cut through the town. With no shortcut in sight, you find yourself still in the center of the square, lanterns flickering above, the murmur of the crowd growing louder as more people whisper about the stains and the lost hours. The urgency of your mission presses against the damp night air, but for now, the temple remains just beyond reach.

No dice rolls or new NPC dialogue.Narrative: You push forward toward the temple, but the harbor stretches out in front of you, blocking a direct path. The cobblestones of the town square give way to the bustling docks, with the clang of iron and the scent of brine filling the air. Merchants shout over each other, and a guard in a bright blue uniform watches from the corner of the square, his eyes flicking toward the harbor. The temple of the Tide lies on the far side of town, past the harbor, but you cannot cross it from here. You remain in the Town Square, feeling the weight of the bloodstain rumors pressing on your mind as the night deepens.
Attempt 2 (failed validation)
Raw Output - Attempt 2
Thoughts: The player wants to confront Cleric Serah at the Temple of the Tide. The temple is not adjacent to Town Square, so movement is blocked. We must narrate the failed attempt, describe the current environment, and remind the player that they are still in the Town Square, feeling unease. Provide a brief suggestion of next steps without forcing choices.Narrative: You grip the railing of the bronze fountain coin, feeling the cold stone beneath your fingers, and set your sights on the Temple of the Tide. However, the path to the temple is not a straight line from the town square; it lies beyond the harbor and past the Watch Barracks. As you step forward, a group of guards on the bridge blocks your way, their torches flickering in the night air. The guards do not allow you to cross without proper authorization, and you cannot simply bypass them. You find yourself still standing in the cobbled heart of the harbor town, surrounded by traders, guards, and the distant murmur of dockhands. The lanterns glow dimly, casting long shadows on the stones, and the rumors of bloodstains and lost hours swirl in the air. Your unease grows, and you realize you must find another way into the temple—perhaps through the Watch Barracks, the East Alley, or by speaking with a town official—before you can confront Cleric Serah.
NAR-15Multi-step: blocked movement action for investigation action to find NPC to attack them | Attempts: 1 | Time: 3.10s | Words: 1141.000
Attempts: 1 | Time: 3.10s | Words: 114
Player input: I sprout wings and fly across the harbor to find Cleric Serah, then stab her before she can speak.
FieldExpectedActualResult
has_two_sectionspasspassPASS

concisepasspassPASS
Generated Narrative
The wind whips across the wooden piers, carrying the briny scent of the harbor. As you spread your arms, nothing but the familiar creak of ropes and the distant chatter of fishermen greet you. Your body feels unchanged; no wings sprout, no lift off the ground. A faint ripple of unease passes through the crowd, but no one notices your sudden intent. The sea of boats remains as it always has, and the harbor’s pulse keeps steady. In the distance, the spires of the Temple of the Tide rise above the water, a reminder that Cleric Serah is not here to be found. You remain on the dock, the same place you were before.
Raw LLM Output (last attempt)
Thoughts: The player’s plan is impossible: wings cannot sprout, Serah isn’t present at the docks, and the game rules prevent unprovoked murder of a key NPC. We must politely refuse the action, keep the player in place, and maintain the atmospheric tone of the docks.

Narrative: The wind whips across the wooden piers, carrying the briny scent of the harbor. As you spread your arms, nothing but the familiar creak of ropes and the distant chatter of fishermen greet you. Your body feels unchanged; no wings sprout, no lift off the ground. A faint ripple of unease passes through the crowd, but no one notices your sudden intent. The sea of boats remains as it always has, and the harbor’s pulse keeps steady. In the distance, the spires of the Temple of the Tide rise above the water, a reminder that Cleric Serah is not here to be found. You remain on the dock, the same place you were before.

The barkeep Mara watches everything from behind the counter.", "connections": ["Back Door - Copper Cup", "Bar Counter", "Stair Landing", "Town Square"], "tags": ["interior", "tavern", "social", "rumors"]}, {"key": "Docks", "name": "Docks", "description": "Wooden piers stretch out over dark water, crowded with fishing boats and the occasional merchant ship. Ropes creak, gulls wheel overhead, and the smell of tar and brine hangs thick in the air.", "connections": ["Fishermen's Shacks", "Harbor Gate", "Warehouse Row"], "tags": ["outdoor", "harbor", "labor"]}, {"key": "East Alley", "name": "East Alley", "description": "A narrow alley where scrubbed cobbles never quite lose their stains. Laundry lines sway overhead, shutters crack open when footsteps pass, and several doorframes show marks that look recently cleaned.", "connections": ["Back Door - Copper Cup", "Old Shrine", "Town Square"], "tags": ["outdoor", "shadowed", "crime_scene"]}, {"key": "Fishermen's Shacks", "name": "Fishermen's Shacks", "description": "A cluster of small wooden shacks perched on pilings above the river. Nets hang to dry, and lantern-light spills from half-open doors late into the night. In more than one doorway, dark stains mar the floorboards with no memory of how they appeared.", "connections": ["Docks", "Riverside Path"], "tags": ["outdoor", "residential", "harbor"]}, {"key": "Harbor Gate", "name": "Harbor Gate", "description": "An archway of weathered stone opening toward the piers. Guard posts on either side watch the flow of carts and sailors between the town and the docks.", "connections": ["Docks", "Market Stalls", "South Bridge", "Town Square", "Warehouse Row", "Watch Barracks"], "tags": ["outdoor", "checkpoint", "harbor"]}, {"key": "Lumberyard", "name": "Lumberyard", "description": "Stacks of freshly cut logs and the tang of sap fill the air. A small shack nearby shows scuffed floorboards and a corner where someone scrubbed at dried, dark stains.", "connections": ["Riverside Path"], "tags": ["outdoor", "labor", "woodcutters"]}, {"key": "Market Stalls", "name": "Market Stalls", "description": "Canvas-topped stalls ring the edge of the square, half-closed for the evening. Fishmongers rinse boards, spice vendors shutter crates, and everyone trades the same uneasy gossip before heading home.", "connections": ["Harbor Gate", "Old Well", "Town Hall", "Town Square"], "tags": ["outdoor", "market", "public"]}, {"key": "Old Shrine", "name": "Old Shrine", "description": "A crumbling wayside shrine tucked into a bend of the alley, its carvings worn by sea-wind and salt. Offerings of shells and coins gather in a shallow stone bowl.", "connections": ["East Alley", "Temple of the Tide"], "tags": ["outdoor", "sacred", "quiet"]}, {"key": "Old Well", "name": "Old Well", "description": "An old stone well at the edge of the square, its rope replaced more than once. Locals say its water never runs dry, and that it connects to forgotten tunnels beneath the town. Faint rust-brown stains cling to some of the stones as though someone once washed something away here.", "connections": ["Market Stalls", "Smuggler's Entrance", "Temple of the Tide", "Town Square"], "tags": ["outdoor", "mystery_site", "public"]}, {"key": "Riverside Path", "name": "Riverside Path", "description": "A muddy path following the riverbank toward the outskirts. Reeds whisper in the breeze, and shallow boats are pulled up onto the shore.", "connections": ["Fishermen's Shacks", "Lumberyard", "South Bridge"], "tags": ["outdoor", "river", "travel"]}, {"key": "Smuggler's Entrance", "name": "Smuggler's Entrance", "description": "A half-concealed grate and narrow stone steps leading below the warehouses. The smell of damp and old river-mud clings to the air here.", "connections": ["Old Well", "Warehouse Row"], "tags": ["hidden", "underground", "crime"]}, {"key": "South Bridge", "name": "South Bridge", "description": "A low stone bridge arching over a narrow river that feeds the harbor. Lanterns line the parapet, and you can see both the town walls and the distant open sea from its center. More than one passerby has reported waking here with aching feet and no memory of how they arrived.", "connections": ["Harbor Gate", "Riverside Path", "Town Square"], "tags": ["outdoor", "crossing", "river"]}, {"key": "Stair Landing", "name": "Stair Landing", "description": "A narrow staircase creaks toward the upper rooms. A rope discourages casual wanderers.", "connections": ["Copper Cup", "Storeroom Door"], "tags": ["interior", "transit", "tavern"]}, {"key": "Storeroom Door", "name": "Storeroom Door", "description": "A stout oak door with a brass four-dial combination lock. The correct code is 0415.", "connections": ["Back Door - Copper Cup", "Stair Landing"], "tags": ["interior", "locked", "tavern"]}, {"key": "Temple of the Tide", "name": "Temple of the Tide", "description": "A modest stone temple overlooking the square, its doors carved with waves and storm-clouds. Inside, candles flicker before a statue of a calm, watchful sea goddess. Many townsfolk come here seeking answers for the nights they cannot remember.", "connections": ["Old Shrine", "Old Well", "Town Square"], "tags": ["interior", "sacred", "public"]}, {"key": "Town Hall", "name": "Town Hall", "description": "A timber-framed civic hall with a cluttered notice board and nervous clerks inside.", "connections": ["Market Stalls", "Town Square"], "tags": ["interior", "civic", "public"]}, {"key": "Town Square", "name": "Town Square", "description": "The cobbled heart of the harbor town, lit by lanterns and restless conversation. Traders, guards, and dockhands all pass through here, and tonight nearly every conversation circles back to bloodstains, lost hours, and blame.", "connections": ["Copper Cup", "East Alley", "Harbor Gate", "Market Stalls", "Old Well", "South Bridge", "Temple of the Tide", "Town Hall", "Watch Barracks", "Wizard's House"], "tags": ["outdoor", "hub", "public", "rumors"]}, {"key": "Warehouse Row", "name": "Warehouse Row", "description": "A line of squat stone warehouses hugs the waterfront. Racks of spears stand by the door, and off-duty guards swap stories on the steps when the weather is mild.", "connections": ["Harbor Gate", "Town Square", "Wizard's House"], "tags": ["interior", "security", "civic"]}, {"key": "Wizard's House", "name": "Wizard's House", "description": "A tall stone house with shuttered windows and a heavy iron fence, set just off the square. Lanterns burn late behind the curtains, and a pair of hired guards discourage casual callers.", "connections": ["Town Square", "Watch Barracks"], "tags": ["interior", "arcane", "restricted"]}]}

A weather-beaten sailor with a limp. Forgetful of his wedding anniversary date.", "location": "Copper Cup", "skills": {"athletics": 2, "survival": 2, "perception": 2, "insight": 1}, "stats": {"strength": 12, "dexterity": 12, "constitution": 12, "intelligence": 10, "wisdom": 11, "charisma": 10}, "tags": ["sailor", "local"], "memory": ["Brin swears he locked the storeroom himself, but sometimes wakes unsure whether he worked the late shift at all.", "He trusts Mara and avoids speaking openly about the stains in front of strangers."]}, {"key": "Captain Varr", "name": "Captain Varr", "entity_type": "npc", "description": "Captain Varr is a broad-shouldered veteran with a scar along his jaw. He takes the town's safety personally and has little patience for fools, but respects those who pull their weight.", "location": "Watch Barracks", "skills": {"athletics": 3, "perception": 2, "intimidation": 2, "insight": 1}, "stats": {"strength": 13, "dexterity": 12, "constitution": 12, "intelligence": 10, "wisdom": 11, "charisma": 10}, "tags": ["watch", "authority"], "memory": ["Varr has increased patrol rotations because reports cluster around the same hours before dawn.", "He is suspicious of the wizard, but equally concerned that fear is pushing townsfolk toward vigilantism."]}, {"key": "Caretaker Ilya", "name": "Caretaker Ilya", "entity_type": "npc", "description": "Ilya quietly cleans the old shrine and replaces wilted offerings. She claims to have seen strange lights near the well on stormy nights.", "location": "Old Shrine", "skills": {"insight": 3, "medicine": 3, "religion": 2, "perception": 2}, "stats": {"strength": 9, "dexterity": 10, "constitution": 11, "intelligence": 12, "wisdom": 15, "charisma": 12}, "tags": ["shrine", "caretaker", "omens"], "memory": ["Ilya has found fresh offerings at the old shrine placed by hands that later denied visiting.", "She believes the town is caught in a cycle that repeats each night with pieces missing each morning."]}, {"key": "Cleric Serah", "name": "Cleric Serah", "entity_type": "npc", "description": "Serah, a middle-aged cleric of the sea goddess, tends to sailors and townsfolk alike. She listens more than she speaks and keeps a careful eye on omens from the harbor\u2014and on the strange emptiness in the eyes of those who wake up with blood on their doorsteps.", "location": "Temple of the Tide", "skills": {"insight": 3, "medicine": 3, "religion": 2, "perception": 2}, "stats": {"strength": 9, "dexterity": 10, "constitution": 11, "intelligence": 12, "wisdom": 15, "charisma": 12}, "tags": ["temple", "healer", "trusted"], "memory": ["Serah has treated people with stress wounds and torn clothing they cannot explain.", "She keeps private notes on recurring symbols linked to the bloodstains and memory lapses."]}, {"key": "Cook Brenna", "name": "Cook Brenna", "entity_type": "npc", "description": "Brenna is the Copper Cup's harried cook, always juggling pots and shouting orders through the kitchen door. She hears everything that happens near the back rooms.", "location": "Back Door - Copper Cup", "skills": {"athletics": 3, "survival": 2, "perception": 1}, "stats": {"strength": 14, "dexterity": 11, "constitution": 13, "intelligence": 9, "wisdom": 10, "charisma": 9}, "tags": ["tavern", "staff"], "memory": ["Brenna hears every argument near the back door and noticed Mitch pacing there before dawn twice this week.", "She remembers seeing dark smears on a crate that were gone after sunrise."]}, {"key": "Deckhand Finn", "name": "Deckhand Finn", "entity_type": "npc", "description": "Finn is a young deckhand with rope-burned hands and boundless curiosity. He listens in on sailor gossip and can point out trouble brewing on the piers.", "location": "Docks", "skills": {"athletics": 2, "survival": 2, "perception": 2, "insight": 1}, "stats": {"strength": 12, "dexterity": 12, "constitution": 12, "intelligence": 10, "wisdom": 11, "charisma": 10}, "tags": ["dockworker", "gossip"], "memory": ["Finn saw someone rinsing a rope at the dock pump well past curfew.", "He spreads rumors quickly but gets details right more often than people expect."]}, {"key": "Dockmaster Hara", "name": "Dockmaster Hara", "entity_type": "npc", "description": "Hara keeps a ledger tucked under one arm as she strides up and down the docks. She knows which ships arrived late, which cargo went missing, and which captains owe favors. She is quietly furious about the unexplained stains turning up near her warehouses.", "location": "Docks", "skills": {"persuasion": 3, "insight": 2, "investigation": 2, "deception": 1}, "stats": {"strength": 10, "dexterity": 11, "constitution": 10, "intelligence": 12, "wisdom": 12, "charisma": 13}, "tags": ["harbor", "authority"], "memory": ["Hara tracks cargo and says missing-hour gaps line up with unexplained ledger discrepancies.", "She quietly suspects a cover-up larger than simple dockside crime."]}, {"key": "Edda", "name": "Edda", "entity_type": "npc", "description": "A scholar cataloging tavern legends, forever scribbling into a leather folio.", "location": "Copper Cup", "skills": {"history": 4, "investigation": 3, "insight": 2, "arcana": 2}, "stats": {"strength": 9, "dexterity": 11, "constitution": 10, "intelligence": 15, "wisdom": 13, "charisma": 11}, "tags": ["scholar", "observer"], "memory": ["Edda is cataloging oral histories and noticed old legends describing memory theft tied to blood oaths.", "She thinks the present crisis mirrors a partial account from decades ago."]}, {"key": "Fence Caris", "name": "Fence Caris", "entity_type": "npc", "description": "Caris leans in the shadows near a back door, dealing in small stolen goods and no questions asked. She prefers to stay out of sight when guards are near.", "location": "East Alley", "skills": {"stealth": 4, "sleight_of_hand": 3, "investigation": 2, "deception": 2, "perception": 2}, "stats": {"strength": 10, "dexterity": 14, "constitution": 11, "intelligence": 12, "wisdom": 11, "charisma": 13}, "tags": ["underworld", "fence"], "memory": ["Caris sold lock tools to someone matching Mitch's build, but keeps that detail close.", "She avoids the Smugglers Entrance on nights when the moon is hidden."]}, {"key": "Fisher Mira", "name": "Fisher Mira", "entity_type": "npc", "description": "Mira cleans fish with quick, practiced motions, humming an old sea-song under her breath. She keeps an eye on the river for signs of storms or trouble, and she is one of the few who admits she sometimes wakes up with her boots wet and no memory of why.", "location": "Fishermen's Shacks", "skills": {"athletics": 2, "survival": 2, "perception": 2, "insight": 1}, "stats": {"strength": 12, "dexterity": 12, "constitution": 12, "intelligence": 10, "wisdom": 11, "charisma": 10}, "tags": ["riverfolk", "witness"], "memory": ["Mira has awakened with wet boots and river silt in her doorway despite no memory of leaving bed.", "She trusts cleric Serah more than the watch to handle delicate truths."]}, {"key": "Fisher Rian", "name": "Fisher Rian", "entity_type": "npc", "description": "Rian mends nets on an upturned crate outside his shack, grumbling about changing tides and strange catches pulled from deeper waters.", "location": "Fishermen's Shacks", "skills": {"athletics": 3, "survival": 2, "perception": 1}, "stats": {"strength": 14, "dexterity": 11, "constitution": 13, "intelligence": 9, "wisdom": 10, "charisma": 9}, "tags": ["riverfolk"], "memory": ["Rian has pulled torn cloth and dark residue from his nets at dawn several times.", "He believes someone is moving bodies or evidence by water before sunrise."]}, {"key": "Fishmonger Talo", "name": "Fishmonger Talo", "entity_type": "npc", "description": "Talo's stall overflows with the day's catch laid over crushed ice. He knows every captain on the docks and the gossip that rides in with their ships.", "location": "Market Stalls", "skills": {"persuasion": 3, "insight": 2, "investigation": 2, "deception": 1}, "stats": {"strength": 10, "dexterity": 11, "constitution": 10, "intelligence": 12, "wisdom": 12, "charisma": 13}, "tags": ["market", "merchant"], "memory": ["Talo hears gossip from every crew and says fear has cut evening market traffic in half.", "He remembers seeing Mitch buy extra lamp oil on a night now missing from many memories."]}, {"key": "Foreman Kesh", "name": "Foreman Kesh", "entity_type": "npc", "description": "Kesh oversees the loading crews with a barked order and a sharp eye. He insists everything is above board, but his ledgers don't always match what moves in the night.", "location": "Warehouse Row", "skills": {"athletics": 3, "survival": 2, "perception": 1}, "stats": {"strength": 14, "dexterity": 11, "constitution": 13, "intelligence": 9, "wisdom": 10, "charisma": 9}, "tags": ["warehouse", "foreman"], "memory": ["Kesh has corrected warehouse counts after nights when workers insist they never unloaded cargo.", "He knows Lia uses the tunnels but denies official knowledge."]}, {"key": "Gate Guard Ren", "name": "Gate Guard Ren", "entity_type": "npc", "description": "Ren leans on his spear at the harbor gate, sizing up everyone who passes. He's seen enough trouble to be wary, but a kind word or shared drink can loosen his tongue.", "location": "Harbor Gate", "skills": {"athletics": 3, "perception": 2, "intimidation": 2, "insight": 1}, "stats": {"strength": 13, "dexterity": 12, "constitution": 12, "intelligence": 10, "wisdom": 11, "charisma": 10}, "tags": ["watch", "checkpoint"], "memory": ["Ren has turned away travelers after midnight because too many arrived confused and bloodstained.", "He keeps a mental list of townsfolk who wander at night and deny it by morning."]}, {"key": "Lysa", "name": "Lysa", "entity_type": "npc", "description": "A traveling bard tuning a battered lute, eager for new tales.", "location": "Copper Cup", "skills": {"performance": 4, "deception": 2, "perception": 2, "persuasion": 2}, "stats": {"strength": 9, "dexterity": 13, "constitution": 10, "intelligence": 11, "wisdom": 10, "charisma": 14}, "tags": ["bard", "traveler"], "memory": ["Lysa collects songs and rumors and has turned local fear into veiled tavern ballads.", "She noticed patrons forgetting songs she just performed the previous evening."]}, {"key": "Mara", "name": "Mara", "entity_type": "npc", "description": "The proprietor. Married to Brin. Her wedding anniversary is April 15th. Brisk, perceptive, and inclined to help if treated respectfully.", "location": "Bar Counter", "skills": {"persuasion": 3, "insight": 2, "investigation": 2, "deception": 1}, "stats": {"strength": 10, "dexterity": 11, "constitution": 10, "intelligence": 12, "wisdom": 12, "charisma": 13}, "tags": ["tavern", "proprietor", "informant"], "memory": ["Mara keeps the storeroom code private and knows someone has tested the lock repeatedly.", "She trusts the player more than most outsiders once they show respect for her staff."]}, {"key": "Mayor Elric", "name": "Mayor Elric", "entity_type": "npc", "description": "Mayor Elric is a tired man in a well-kept coat, juggling merchants' demands and the growing panic over unexplained bloodstains. No one has truly gone missing, but he fears the town is fraying and doesn't know how much longer he can pretend things are under control.", "location": "Town Hall", "skills": {"persuasion": 3, "insight": 2, "investigation": 2, "deception": 1}, "stats": {"strength": 10, "dexterity": 11, "constitution": 10, "intelligence": 12, "wisdom": 12, "charisma": 13}, "tags": ["civic", "authority"], "memory": ["Elric is balancing public calm against private panic and has delayed announcing full incident numbers.", "He asked Scribe Loth to archive certain reports until facts can be verified."]}, {"key": "Mitch", "name": "Mitch", "entity_type": "npc", "description": "A broad-shouldered lumberjack with haunted eyes and a strained need for someone to believe him.", "location": "Town Square", "skills": {"athletics": 3, "survival": 2, "perception": 1}, "stats": {"strength": 14, "dexterity": 11, "constitution": 13, "intelligence": 9, "wisdom": 10, "charisma": 9}, "tags": ["witness", "unstable", "woodcutter", "prime_suspect"], "memory": ["Mitch says he found one of the first bloodstains near the riverside before dawn.", "Mitch keeps blaming the wizard, but his story shifts when asked for details.", "He wakes exhausted with injuries that suggest violent work he cannot consciously recall.", "Mitch says he found one of the first bloodstains near the Riverside Path before dawn.", "Mitch keeps blaming the town wizard, but his story changes when pressed for exact times.", "Mitch looks exhausted and jittery, like he has not slept properly in several nights.", "Mitch's hands are heavily calloused from woodcutting, and he smells like sap, smoke, and wet earth."]}, {"key": "Novice Arel", "name": "Novice Arel", "entity_type": "npc", "description": "Arel is a young acolyte sweeping stone floors and lighting candles. Nervous but earnest, they have seen more than Serah realizes and struggle with what to share.", "location": "Temple of the Tide", "skills": {"insight": 3, "medicine": 3, "religion": 2, "perception": 2}, "stats": {"strength": 9, "dexterity": 10, "constitution": 11, "intelligence": 12, "wisdom": 15, "charisma": 12}, "tags": ["temple", "acolyte"], "memory": ["Arel has seen late-night visitors begging Serah for memory blessings.", "They found prayer beads near the well after a night of heavy rain and panic bells."]}, {"key": "Old Tellan", "name": "Old Tellan", "entity_type": "npc", "description": "Tellan sits on the well's rim spinning stories for anyone who will listen. Some tales are harmless gossip, others hint at things buried under the town and better left alone. Lately his stories keep circling back to nights no one quite remembers.", "location": "Old Well", "skills": {"history": 4, "investigation": 3, "insight": 2, "arcana": 2}, "stats": {"strength": 9, "dexterity": 11, "constitution": 10, "intelligence": 15, "wisdom": 13, "charisma": 11}, "tags": ["storyteller", "wellside"], "memory": ["Tellan claims the old well remembers what people choose to forget.", "His stories repeat specific names and dates that later appear in official reports."]}, {"key": "Player", "name": "Player", "entity_type": "player", "description": "The player character investigating the harbor town mystery.", "location": "Copper Cup", "skills": {"perception": 2, "investigation": 3, "insight": 1}, "stats": {"strength": 10, "dexterity": 14, "constitution": 12, "intelligence": 12, "wisdom": 13, "charisma": 11}, "tags": ["player"], "memory": ["You came to town chasing rumors about bloodstains and missing memories."]}, {"key": "Scribe Loth", "name": "Scribe Loth", "entity_type": "npc", "description": "Loth is a meticulous scribe surrounded by inkpots and scrolls. He files complaints, tallies taxes, and occasionally buries inconvenient paperwork for the right favor.", "location": "Town Hall", "skills": {"history": 4, "investigation": 3, "insight": 2, "arcana": 2}, "stats": {"strength": 9, "dexterity": 11, "constitution": 10, "intelligence": 15, "wisdom": 13, "charisma": 11}, "tags": ["civic", "records"], "memory": ["Loth has filed multiple identical complaints from the same households across different dates.", "He maintains a hidden duplicate ledger because public records keep getting quietly amended."]}, {"key": "Smuggler Lia", "name": "Smuggler Lia", "entity_type": "npc", "description": "Lia moves quietly through the shadows beneath the warehouses. She trades in information as much as contraband and always seems to know who's asking too many questions.", "location": "Smuggler's Entrance", "skills": {"stealth": 4, "sleight_of_hand": 3, "investigation": 2, "deception": 2, "perception": 2}, "stats": {"strength": 10, "dexterity": 14, "constitution": 11, "intelligence": 12, "wisdom": 11, "charisma": 13}, "tags": ["underworld", "smuggler"], "memory": ["Lia uses the tunnel routes and has seen signs of hurried cleanup near Warehouse Row before sunrise.", "She will trade sensitive information for leverage, not loyalty."]}, {"key": "Spice Seller Nima", "name": "Spice Seller Nima", "entity_type": "npc", "description": "Nima sells jars of pungent spices and dried peppers from distant ports. Her keen nose and sharper memory make her a quiet observer of who buys what and why.", "location": "Market Stalls", "skills": {"persuasion": 3, "insight": 2, "investigation": 2, "deception": 1}, "stats": {"strength": 10, "dexterity": 11, "constitution": 10, "intelligence": 12, "wisdom": 12, "charisma": 13}, "tags": ["market", "merchant", "keen_observer"], "memory": ["Nima tracks unusual purchases and noticed a spike in lye, lamp oil, and bandages.", "She remembers voices arguing near Old Well just before dawn on market day."]}, {"key": "Street Performer Jorin", "name": "Street Performer Jorin", "entity_type": "npc", "description": "Jorin juggles knives and colored stones for gathered onlookers. Quick with a joke and quicker with his hands, he hears rumors before most anyone else.", "location": "Town Square", "skills": {"performance": 4, "deception": 2, "perception": 2, "persuasion": 2}, "stats": {"strength": 9, "dexterity": 13, "constitution": 10, "intelligence": 11, "wisdom": 10, "charisma": 14}, "tags": ["performer", "rumor_network"], "memory": ["Jorin watches faces while performing and can spot who is lying about where they were at night.", "He heard Mitch muttering about red hands that do not stay clean."]}, {"key": "Street Urchin Pip", "name": "Street Urchin Pip", "entity_type": "npc", "description": "Pip is a sharp-eyed child who knows every shortcut and loose shutter in the alleyways. They trade trinkets and rumors in exchange for coin, food, or kindness.", "location": "East Alley", "skills": {"stealth": 4, "sleight_of_hand": 3, "perception": 2, "insight": 1}, "stats": {"strength": 8, "dexterity": 14, "constitution": 10, "intelligence": 11, "wisdom": 12, "charisma": 10}, "tags": ["streetwise", "informant"], "memory": ["Pip knows hidden routes between East Alley, the back door, and warehouse drains.", "They found a knife wrap with fresh rust near a loose brick and left it where only they can recover it."]}, {"key": "Thom", "name": "Thom", "entity_type": "npc", "description": "An off-duty guard who prefers order and dislikes surprises upstairs.", "location": "Copper Cup", "skills": {"athletics": 3, "perception": 2, "intimidation": 2, "insight": 1}, "stats": {"strength": 13, "dexterity": 12, "constitution": 12, "intelligence": 10, "wisdom": 11, "charisma": 10}, "tags": ["watch", "off_duty_guard"], "memory": ["Thom saw watch reports edited after meetings with the mayor and the wizard.", "He dislikes surprises and reacts poorly when civilians interfere with barracks protocol."]}, {"key": "Town Crier Jessa", "name": "Town Crier Jessa", "entity_type": "npc", "description": "Jessa rings a handbell and repeats the town's latest bad news to anyone who will listen.", "location": "Town Square", "skills": {"persuasion": 3, "insight": 2, "investigation": 2, "deception": 1}, "stats": {"strength": 10, "dexterity": 11, "constitution": 10, "intelligence": 12, "wisdom": 12, "charisma": 13}, "tags": ["public_voice", "civic"], "memory": ["Jessa has repeated emergency notices all day and can recite each official statement verbatim.", "She noticed the wording of town warnings changed three times within two days."]}, {"key": "Town Wizard Arlen", "name": "Town Wizard Arlen", "entity_type": "npc", "description": "Arlen is a reclusive wizard who seldom leaves his guarded home. Whispers say he can pluck souls back from the brink and smooth away memories like ink from parchment.", "location": "Wizard's House", "skills": {"arcana": 5, "investigation": 4, "insight": 3, "history": 3}, "stats": {"strength": 8, "dexterity": 12, "constitution": 11, "intelligence": 16, "wisdom": 14, "charisma": 12}, "tags": ["arcane", "reclusive", "high_stakes"], "memory": ["Arlen has used risky memory-working spells to reduce panic after each night of violence.", "He believes containing the cycle is safer than exposing every detail to a terrified public."]}]}

**Mechanics Todo List – “Ask Mitch about the bloodstains”**

1. **Move the player to Town Square**  
   - Verify that the path from **Copper Cup** → **Town Square** is traversable (no locked doors or barriers).  
   - Update the Player’s location to **Town Square**.

2. **Confirm the player can interact with Mitch**  
   - Run `check_can_interact(Player, Mitch)` to ensure the NPC is present and available for conversation.

3. **Initiate the dialogue**  
   - Trigger the “talk” interaction with Mitch.  
   - Since Mitch is a nervous, reluctant witness, the GM should decide whether a social skill check is needed to coax useful information.

4. **Social skill check (Persuasion / Insight)**  
   - **Option A – Persuasion:** Roll a Persuasion check using the Player’s Charisma (11) plus any Persuasion modifier (none listed, so just the ability score).  
   - **Option B – Insight:** Roll an Insight check using the Player’s Insight skill (1) plus Wisdom (13).  
   - Choose the appropriate check based on the tone of the question (e.g., Persuasion if the player is trying to convince Mitch to open up; Insight if the player is simply probing for truth).  
   - Set a reasonable DC (e.g., **DC 12** for basic cooperation, **DC 15** for detailed recollection).

5. **Resolve the check**  
   - **Success:** Reveal Mitch’s relevant memories about the bloodstains (e.g., “I found one of the first bloodstains near the Riverside Path before dawn…”, plus any additional details he can recall).  
   - **Partial success / Failure:** Give Mitch a vague or contradictory answer (e.g., “I saw the stain, but I can’t remember exactly where…”, or he deflects blame to the wizard).  

6. **Update NPC memory**  
   - If the player obtains new information, append a new memory entry to Mitch’s memory log reflecting the disclosed details.  
   - If the player fails, optionally add a memory entry noting Mitch’s evasiveness or agitation.

7. **Log the outcome**  
   - Record the result of the movement, interaction check, and any social skill roll in the game log for future reference.
